item.title: Test Drives That Lead to More
item.description: A simple test drive sparks excitement and new opportunities. Watch how one ride can lead to unexpected discoveries and decisions in the automotive world.

media:content.media:title: Test Drives That Lead to More
media:content.media:description: A simple test drive sparks excitement and new opportunities. Watch how one ride can lead to unexpected discoveries and decisions in the automotive world.

item.title: 18-Year-Old Tractor Gets Major Upgrades
item.description: An 18-year-old tractor receives new upgrades to improve performance and efficiency. Watch the restoration and modernization process in action on the farm.

media:content.media:title: 18-Year-Old Tractor Gets Major Upgrades
media:content.media:description: An 18-year-old tractor receives new upgrades to improve performance and efficiency. Watch the restoration and modernization process in action on the farm.

item.title: Quad Tractor Breaks Down on the Farm
item.description: Watch as a quad tractor experiences a breakdown during farm work. See the troubleshooting and repair process to get it running smoothly again.

media:content.media:title: Quad Tractor Breaks Down on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Watch as a quad tractor experiences a breakdown during farm work. See the troubleshooting and repair process to get it running smoothly again.

item.title: Caterpillar D4 Hyster Winch Overhaul
item.description: Watch the complete overhaul of a Caterpillar D4 Hyster winch. Restoration steps focus on regaining full power and functionality for heavy-duty operations.

media:content.media:title: Caterpillar D4 Hyster Winch Overhaul
media:content.media:description: Watch the complete overhaul of a Caterpillar D4 Hyster winch. Restoration steps focus on regaining full power and functionality for heavy-duty operations.

item.title: Smallest Tractor Needs Work Before Sale
item.description: Watch the smallest tractor in the fleet get a thorough checkup and repairs before being sold. See the maintenance, challenges, and prep work involved.

media:content.media:title: Smallest Tractor Needs Work Before Sale
media:content.media:description: Watch the smallest tractor in the fleet get a thorough checkup and repairs before being sold. See the maintenance, challenges, and prep work involved.

item.title: We’re in a Selling Mood
item.description: Watch as equipment and farm items get ready for sale. See the prep, cleanup, and decisions involved in selling and passing along valuable machinery.

media:content.media:title: We’re in a Selling Mood
media:content.media:description: Watch as equipment and farm items get ready for sale. See the prep, cleanup, and decisions involved in selling and passing along valuable machinery.

item.title: Skunk Attack! Tile System Clogged
item.description: Watch the chaos when a skunk causes a clogged tile system. See the cleanup, troubleshooting, and steps taken to restore proper drainage on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Skunk Attack! Tile System Clogged
media:content.media:description: Watch the chaos when a skunk causes a clogged tile system. See the cleanup, troubleshooting, and steps taken to restore proper drainage on the farm.

item.title: The Big Red 3-Wheeler Will Live On
item.description: Watch as the Big Red 3-wheeler gets restored and preserved. See the repairs, maintenance, and care that keep this classic vehicle running for years to come.

media:content.media:title: The Big Red 3-Wheeler Will Live On
media:content.media:description: Watch as the Big Red 3-wheeler gets restored and preserved. See the repairs, maintenance, and care that keep this classic vehicle running for years to come.

item.title: We Had to Remove the Entire Floor
item.description: Watch the challenging process of removing an entire floor. See the steps, tools, and effort involved in tackling a major renovation or repair project.

media:content.media:title: We Had to Remove the Entire Floor
media:content.media:description: Watch the challenging process of removing an entire floor. See the steps, tools, and effort involved in tackling a major renovation or repair project.

item.title: Testing the New John Deere 830
item.description: Watch the new John Deere 830 in action. See its performance, features, and capabilities as it takes on tough farm tasks in real-world conditions.

media:content.media:title: Testing the New John Deere 830
media:content.media:description: Watch the new John Deere 830 in action. See its performance, features, and capabilities as it takes on tough farm tasks in real-world conditions.

item.title: Brody’s Christmas Present Has Arrived
item.description: Watch the excitement as Brody receives a special Christmas gift. See the unboxing, reactions, and joy of opening a present that makes the holiday unforgettable.

media:content.media:title: Brody’s Christmas Present Has Arrived
media:content.media:description: Watch the excitement as Brody receives a special Christmas gift. See the unboxing, reactions, and joy of opening a present that makes the holiday unforgettable.

item.title: Big Road Trip for Brody and the Planter
item.description: Watch Brody take the planter on a big road trip. See the transport, challenges, and excitement as this essential farm equipment moves to its next destination.

media:content.media:title: Big Road Trip for Brody and the Planter
media:content.media:description: Watch Brody take the planter on a big road trip. See the transport, challenges, and excitement as this essential farm equipment moves to its next destination.

item.title: Cleaning Out the Original Shop Office
item.description: Watch as we clean out the original shop office, discovering a time capsule of tools, papers, and memories. See the surprises hidden in this historic workspace.

media:content.media:title: Cleaning Out the Original Shop Office
media:content.media:description: Watch as we clean out the original shop office, discovering a time capsule of tools, papers, and memories. See the surprises hidden in this historic workspace.
